title: SunStream USA Poised to Acquire Cannabis Assets
text: SNDL Inc. announced through its joint venture SunStream Bancorp that the SunStream USA group intends to acquire equity positions in U.S. cannabis assets following Nasdaq's regulatory review completion. The structure includes SunStream USA I, LLC and SunStream USA II, LLC, with SNDL's affiliate holding non-voting exchangeable securities. SNDL will not consolidate financial statements of these entities until permitted under applicable law. SunStream USA plans to acquire non-performing credit investments from SunStream Opportunities LP, resulting in majority equity positions in Surterra Holdings (operating as Parallel) and Greenpeak Industries (operating as Skymint). Parallel operates across Florida, Massachusetts, Nevada, and Texas, while Skymint operates in Michigan. CEO Zach George stated: This initiative creates attractive optionality for SNDL upon federal legalization to deploy additional investment capital. Strategic benefits include: U.S. equity ownership contingent on federal legalization, majority ownership in companies spanning five states, pro forma positioning among top 10 MSOs based on Q1 2024 revenue, access to markets exceeding 60 million consumers with $5 billion in aggregate sales, and potential top-five North American ranking upon legalization trigger event.
